# Mudassir Mohammed

> Lead Frontend Developer & Full Stack Engineer specializing in scalable web and mobile systems.

## About

Mudassir Mohammed is a software engineer with 3+ years of professional experience building production-grade web and mobile applications. He is currently employed as Lead Frontend Developer at BestDoc Technology, where he leads frontend development of BestDoc Concierge using Vue, Nuxt, and Vuetify — streamlining request workflows for hospital staff and improving operational efficiency by 35%.

- Website: https://mudassirmhd.in
- Email: pmudassir@gmail.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/pmudassir
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/mudassir-mohammed
- Twitter/X: https://x.com/mudassirmhd

## Skills

**Frontend**: React, Next.js, TypeScript, Vue.js, Nuxt, React Native, Three.js, Redux, Tailwind CSS, Shadcn, Bootstrap
**Backend**: Node.js, NestJS, Express, GraphQL, Socket.io, REST APIs
**Database**: PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, Redis, Prisma
**Cloud & DevOps**: AWS, S3, Firebase, Docker, Kubernetes, Nginx, Vercel, Git
**Languages**: JavaScript, TypeScript, Java, C

## Experience

- **Lead Frontend Developer** — BestDoc Technology (Current)
- **React Native Developer** — App Stone
- **Full Stack Developer** — Eclidse Technologies
